app.name: Women and Girls Ministry Coordination Platform

mifem.brandName: Women and Girls Ministry Coordination Platform

dashboard.title: Incamake
dashboard.welcome: Murakaza neza, {{name}}. Dore ibintu biri gukorwa mu murimo wawe.

attendance.title: Gukurikirana kwitabira
attendance.subtitle: Kwiyandikisha kwa digitale, kode QR, isesengura n'amakuru akoherejwe hanze.
attendance.qrHint: Sikana na telefoni kugira ngo ufungure urubanza rw'iyandikisha (demo).
attendance.exportHint: Kuramo amakuru yo kwiyandikisha kugira ngo ukore raporo.

communication.title: Ikigo cy'itumanaho
communication.subtitle: Amatangazo, bulletini, ubutumwa, SMS, n'amatangazo muri sisitemu.
communication.noAnnouncements: Nta matangazo yabonetse mu rwego rwawe.
communication.subject: Insanganyamatsiko
communication.smsHint: Huza na SMS gateway. Uru rupapuro rufata abatumirwa, template, n'incamake.
communication.editorBodyPlaceholder: Andika itangazo hano. Koresha buto za markdown hejuru gutunganya...

reports.title: Raporo n'igenzura
reports.subtitle: Ibipimo, imibare y'ubuministry, imiterere, no kohereza hanze.

form.title: Umutwe
form.author: Umwanditsi
form.galleryImages: Amafoto ya galeriyi (URL zitandukanyijwe na koma)

leader.title: Ohereza Ibyagezweho
leader.approvalNotice: Ibyoherejwe bigomba kubanza kwemezwa n'ubuyobozi mbere yo gutangazwa.

ach1.title: Ababatijwe 5,000 kuva mu 2020
ach1.summary: Umuryango wishimira umurava mu ivugabutumwa no guhindura abantu abigishwa.
ach1.author: Ibiro by'Itumanaho

ach3.title: "Yasubije amahoro mu rugo rwacu" - Alice M.
ach3.summary: Umunyamuryango wo mu Rubavu asangira uko iteraniro ry'amasengesho ryahinduye urugo rwabo.
ach3.author: Ishami ry'Ibitabo

ach4.title: Itorero rishya ryatangiye mu Field y'Iburasirazuba
ach4.summary: Amatsinda mato n'umurimo w'ubuzima bwiza byafunguye imiryango mu baturage.
ach4.author: Ibiro by'Ubutumwa

ach5.title: Ivugabutumwa ry'urubyiruko mu Karere k'Amajyaruguru
ach5.summary: Byatanzwe ngo bisuzumwe - bitegereje isubirwamo n'ubuyobozi.
ach5.author: Umuhuzabikorwa w'Akarere

admin.title: Gucunga abakoresha na RBAC
admin.subtitle: Kurema abakoresha, gutanga uruhare, uruhare rwa permissions, n'igenzura ry'umutekano.
admin.resetHint: Kohereza ahantu hizewe h'ihindurwa (simulation muri demo).
admin.bulkRegistrationDesc: Emera abandi bayobozi gukoresha dosiye ya Excel mu guhamya abakoresha bavuye mu nzego zabo.
admin.searchPlaceholder: Gungura abakoresha mu izina cyangwa imeri...
admin.deleteConfirmation: Urabyizeye ko ushaka gusiba burundu {{name}}? Iki gikorwa kirabarurwa kandi nticishwe.
admin.resetPasswordDesc: Uhindurira ijambo ry'ibanga {{name}}. Umukoresha azahatirwa guhindura iri jambo ry'agateganyo iyo yinjiye.
admin.resetPasswordComplete: Ha iki jambo ry'ibanga umukoresha. Sisitemu izamusaba guhindura ijambo ry'ibanga akimara kwinjira.
admin.excelDropPrompt: Hitamo cyangwa gukurura dosiye ya Excel (.csv cyangwa .xlsx)
admin.excelMaxSizeHint: Ingano ntarengwa 2MB. Inkingi: amazina, imeri, uruhare (uruhare si itegeko)
admin.bulkSuccessDesc: Imbonerahamwe {{count}} z'abakoresha zaremwe zikandikwa. Konti zose zashyizweho ikimenyetso cyo guhindura ijambo ry'ibanga.
admin.formatError: Ubwoko bwa dosiye ntibwemewe. Nyamuneka ometaho dosiye ya .csv cyangwa .xlsx.
admin.fileTooLarge: Dosiye nini cyane. Ingano igomba kuba munsi ya 2MB.
admin.noDataRows: Dosiye ya Excel nta mibare irimo.
admin.missingColumns: Inkingi "name" cyangwa "email" ntizibonetse. Nyamuneka reba neza Excel.
admin.rowInvalidEmail: Umurongo {{row}}: Aderesi ya imeri itari mu buryo bukwiye ({{email}}).

home.heroSubtitle: Urubuga rwa digitale rwagati rwo gucunga abanyamuryango b'itorero, ibikorwa, kwitabira, na raporo mu Rwanda Union Mission.
home.footer: © {{year}} Women and Girls Ministry Coordination Platform — Rwanda Union Mission (SDA). Uburenganzira bwose bwemejwe.

auth.staffCheckboxErrorStaff: Kwinjira nk'Umukozi/Umuyobozi bisaba kugenzura aka kanya. Nyamuneka ugenzure agasanduku k' "Ndi Umukozi/Umuyobozi" kugira ngo ukomeze.
auth.staffCheckboxErrorMember: Konti yawe ni iy'umunyamuryango usanzwe. Nyamuneka ugureho agasanduku k' "Ndi Umukozi/Umuyobozi".
auth.passwordMinChars: Ijambo ry'ibanga rigomba kugira byibura {{count}} inyuguti
auth.forgotSubtitle: Shyiramo imeri yawe kugira ngo wakire link yo gusubiza ijambo ry'ibanga
auth.forgotCheckEmailMessage: Twohereje link yo gusubiza ijambo ry'ibanga kuri imeri yawe. Nyamuneka reba mu bwoko bw'ibyahishuwe.
auth.resetSubtitle: Shyiraho ijambo ry'ibanga rishya kandi rikomeye
auth.otpSubtitle: Shyiramo kode y'ibice 6 yoherejwe kuri imeri yawe
auth.forcePasswordSubtitle: Uri kwinjira ukoresheje ijambo ry'ibanga ry'agateganyo. Kubera umutekano, ugomba guhindura ijambo ry'ibanga mbere yo kwinjira muri sisitemu.
auth.forcePasswordErrorFailed: Kubahindurira ijambo ry'ibanga byarananiye. Nyamuneka ongera ugerageze.
auth.sessionExpiredSubtitle: Seshoni yawe yarangiye kubera ko udakora. Nyamuneka ongera winjire kugira ngo ukomeze gucunga porutali yawe.
auth.sessionExpiredFooter: Women and Girls Ministry Coordination Platform • Rwanda Union Mission
auth.unauthorizedSubtitle: Nta uburenganzira ufite bwo kureba iyi paji. Nyamuneka wumvisha umuyobozi wa sisitemu niba uke ka ari amakosa.

validation.fullNameMin: Amazina yuzuye agomba kuba byibura inyuguti 2
validation.passwordMin: Ijambo ry'ibanga rigomba kuba byibura inyuguti 6

adminDashboard.realTimeCpu: Ikoreshwa rya memory na CPU mu gihe nyacyo

churchLeaderDashboard.sabbathTracking: Uburyo bwa digitale bwo gukurikirana Isabato
churchLeaderDashboard.chimePlay: Ijwi ry'inzogera rikwiye kuvuga niba ritabujijwe!

fieldLeaderDashboard.zonesReporting: Uturere twose dutanga raporo buri cyumweru
fieldLeaderDashboard.avgWeeklyCheckin: Average weekly check-in rate across all 15 zones

memberDashboard.welcomeMessage: Murakaza neza kuri porutali yanyu. Reba amatangazo, kurikirana kwitabira, no kuvumbura amatsinda mato ari imbere.
memberDashboard.scanHint: Sikana kode QR ya loteri buri Isabato mu gitondo kugira ngo wandikishe ikoreshwa ryanyuma.
memberDashboard.noMissionWords: Nta magambo y'ubutumwa. Admin arashobora kuyongera.

managerDashboard.obsTrendDesc: Isuzuma ry'ibikorwa riturutse mu matsinda y'ibanze
managerDashboard.actionChurchAuditDesc: Suzuma ikoranabuhanga rya Remera SDA Church

zoneLeaderDashboard.churchReportSubmissionsDesc: Kugenzura raporo za buri cyumweru z'imibare
zoneLeaderDashboard.directiveTrainingDesc: Kwigisha abayobozi b'itorero kuri QR code
zoneLeaderDashboard.directiveAuditDesc: Suzuma indangamuntu za Remera na Kigali Central

unionLeaderDashboard.actionPublishDirectiveDesc: Kohereza amabwiriza y'ubutumwa ku Bayobozi b'Idini
unionLeaderDashboard.actionBudgetStatusDesc: Kugenzura inkunga ya Western Rwanda Field
unionLeaderDashboard.actionLeadershipSummitDesc: Kugenzura ko utumirwa rwoherejwe mu turama 5

event.managementSubtitle: Tegura, kurikirana kwitabira, no gucunga ibikorwa by'umurimo mu turere twose.
event.searchPlaceholder: Shakisha ibikorwa ku mazina, aho bikorerwa...
event.selectDateHint: Hitamo itariki kugira ngo urebe ibikorwa
event.noEventsHint: Gerageza guhindura akagenzuro cyangwa kurema igikorwa gishya.

member.directorySubtitle: Gucunga neza abanyamuryango ba Rwanda Union Mission.
member.searchPlaceholder: Shakisha mu izina, imeri, cyangwa indangamuntu...
member.selectFiltersFirst: Hitamo Akagenzuriro kugira ngo Urebe Abanyamuryango
member.selectFiltersPrompt: Koresha akagenzuriro hejuru kugira ngo ugabanye urutonde rw'abanyamuryango.
member.selectDistrictPrompt: Hitamo Akarere hejuru kugira ngo utangire kureba abanyamuryango bo mu idini ryawe.
member.selectChurchPrompt: Hitamo Itorero hejuru kugira ngo utangire kureba abanyamuryango bo mu karere kawe.
member.selectClassPrompt: Hitamo Ishuri ry'Isabato hejuru kugira ngo utangire kureba abanyamuryango bo mu itorero ryawe.
member.noActivity: Nta mateka y'ibikorwa yanditswe kuri uyu munyamuryango.
member.formPhotoHint: Emerwa JPG, GIF cyangwa PNG. Ingano ntarengwa 2MB
member.formVerifiedMember: Umunyamuryango wemeje wa Rwanda Union Mission y'Abadiventisiti b'Umunsi wa Karindwi.

validation.phoneInvalid: Nimero ya telefoni itari mu buryo bukwiye

settings.subtitle: Hitamo ibyishimo, imiterere y'igaragaza, ururimi, amatangazo, na seshoni zikora.
settings.defaultLanguageDesc: Shyiraho ururimi abakoresha bashya bazabona mbere yo kwihitiramo urwabo.
settings.faviconDesc: Shyiraho ikirango cyihariye cy'ikareti ya mushakisha
settings.emailAlertsDesc: Akirira raporo n'amakuru yawe ukoresheje imeri
settings.smsAlertsDesc: Akirira amatangazo yihutirwa kuri telefoni yawe
settings.highContrastDesc: Yongerera imbaraga imipaka n'amagambo kugira ngo usome neza
